title: Create a Filter for Critical Path Only
excerpt: Create a Filter for Critical Path Only, super important once you want to focus on specific tasks on your critical path

posts.author: SharonZomerstein (Sharon)
posts.cookedHtml: Create a Filter for Critical Path Only, super important once you want to focus on specific tasks on your critical path

posts.author: Iryna_Belaya (Iryna Belaya)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello Sharon,

What do you mean by Critical path? How do you highlight such tasks?

posts.author: SharonZomerstein (Sharon)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Iryna,

We have sent loom video and had multiple correspondence with the Monday support team

I’m sorry but I can’t write everything all over again please take a look at the past threads and advise if there is an SLA to the issue

Thanks,

Sharon

posts.author: IzzyLu (Isabell Lu)
posts.cookedHtml:
We would love to use the Gantt chart in a dashboard. By using a filter (or some other option), I want to see only those tasks that are relevant for the critical path. We need to focus on these elements.
It is importantant, that even if dates change and therefore the critical path changes, that this is displayed in the dashboard.
Are you planning on releasing something like that?

posts.author: IzzyLu (Isabell Lu)
posts.cookedHtml:
To better understand what I mean, I created an example:

image534×286 10.4 KB

In this case, all tasks are critical, except Task 4.
With filtering for critical tasks I would love to see only task 1, 2, 3 and 5 after using the filter. Task 4 should disappear from the chart.
As soon as something changes and task 4 would be critical, it should reappear.
I hope that helps with understanding the request.
